goal: Build a 2-cube column stack (cube-on-cube). Robot picks 2 cubes from a conveyor and stacks them vertically: Cube_1 lands on a 15×15cm pallet base at z=0.825, Cube_2 lands ON TOP of Cube_1 at z=0.875. Smallest possible multi-layer stack — tests whether placement on an already-placed object works in practice with drop_targets dispatch.
thoughts:
Six 2-cube-column specifics for CP-13 (extends CP-09's column pattern but simpler — only 2 layers):
1) Pallet base 0.15×0.15×0.05m at [0, -0.4, 0.775] — bigger than CP-09's 10×10cm to give Cube_1 a stable landing area.
2) Cube_1 drops at z=0.825 (pallet top + cube_size/2). Cube_2 drops at z=0.875 (Cube_1 top + cube_size/2). Both at xy=(0, -0.4).
3) Order matters: Cube_1 MUST be placed before Cube_2. Controller picks closest-to-sensor first; with x=-1.4 vs -1.0, Cube_1 (left) gets to sensor zone first via belt motion, picked first. Drop_targets dict ensures right destination regardless of pick order.
4) Robot needs to descend onto Cube_1 to place Cube_2 — gripper opens at z=0.875+EE_offset. Cube_2's bottom face just clears Cube_1's top.
5) Settle pause after Cube_1 placement is critical — Cube_1 may shift before Cube_2 lands. cuRobo handler doesn't currently pause between cubes; relies on RmpFlow's natural cycle.
6) Function-gate measures Cube_1 reaches pallet (delivered to xy bbox). Stack-stability of Cube_2 atop Cube_1 is a function-gate stretch goal.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + parent Xform + table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 2 cubes spaced 0.40m on conveyor — wider than CP-08 to avoid collision
for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.0]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(2)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(2)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Pallet base — 0.15x0.15x0.05m (larger than CP-09's 10x10cm for stability)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/PalletBase", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.075, 0.075, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/PalletBase", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# drop_targets — Cube_1 on PalletBase, Cube_2 on top of Cube_1 (column stack).
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2"],
    destination_path="/World/PalletBase",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [0.0, -0.4, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_2": [0.0, -0.4, 0.875],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/PalletBase"],
)
extension_notes: CP-13 simplifies CP-09 from 5-cube tower to 2-cube — meaningful as the smallest stack. Validates that the drop_targets dict pattern works with z increasing per cube layer. PalletBase 15×15cm wider than CP-09's 10×10cm to give Cube_1 stable landing area before Cube_2 lands on it. Future variant: scale to N cubes via compute_stack_placement(column, n_items=N).
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + parent Xform + table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_prim(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{primary_destination.position}}, scale={{primary_destination.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{workpieces[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{workpieces[1].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
failure_modes: Cube_2 misses Cube_1 — drop xy precision off by >2.5cm pushes Cube_2 off Cube_1's top face. PalletBase 15cm gives margin for ground-level miss but Cube_1 itself is only 5cm wide.
Cube_1 shifted by Cube_2 placement impulse — Cube_2 lands with downward velocity, knocks Cube_1 sideways. Settle pause between cubes would help.
Robot can't descend low enough for Cube_1 (z=0.825) without colliding with PalletBase (top z=0.80). Margin is 25mm — within EE_INITIAL_HEIGHT auto-clearance.
Robot can't reach Cube_2 drop z=0.875 — well within Franka's vertical reach 0.85m above base.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (180s sim — orig 90s too short. cube_final=(-0.04, -0.47, 0.825) in Bin)
